Hero.title: Simplify your thinking.
Hero.subtitle: Build systems.
Hero.body: I design AI-powered revenue systems for agencies and B2B service businesses — so founders can focus on the work only they can do. Based in Paris. Founder of <kaav>KaavOps</kaav> and <simine>Simine Paris</simine>.

Problem.label: The Problem
Problem.headline: Most service businesses are built around their founders.
Problem.subheadline: Your pipeline works because you work it. Your delivery happens because you oversee it. You are the engine, but also the bottleneck.

points.bottleneck: Founders spend 60% of their time on repetitive tasks.
points.scaling: Revenue plateaus because there are only so many hours in your day.
points.freedom: If you stop working, the system stops growing.
